preferences.currencyDescription: Currency controls displayed pricing and checkout currency. Your choice is saved for next time.

hero.title: Bring everyone closer to the celebration.
hero.description: Simple, private livestreaming for weddings and family simchas. Share the moment beautifully with loved ones anywhere in the world.

createEvent.title: Create Event
createEvent.description: Set up a private livestream page for your simcha. You can share the event link as soon as it is created.
createEvent.privacyDescription: Add an optional password so only invited family and friends can enter the livestream and access its recording.
createEvent.premiumTitle: More time, more guests, and a lasting replay
createEvent.premiumDescription: Create your event first, then upgrade that event to Premium when you are ready. Premium gives families a fuller livestream experience for bigger simchas.
createEvent.premiumFootnote: Premium is purchased after event creation and applies only to this specific event.

alerts.confirmEmail: Please confirm your email before creating an event
alerts.loginRequired: Please log in before creating an event

eventCreated.title: Your event is ready
eventCreated.premiumDescription: Add automatic recording, replay for 30 days, download access, and a longer Premium livestream for this event.
eventCreated.readyDescription: Start the livestream when the celebration begins. You can also return and start it later from My Events.

alerts.checkoutLogin: Please log in before upgrading to Premium
alerts.goLiveLogin: Please log in before starting a livestream

myEvents.title: My Events
myEvents.description: Manage your upcoming livestreams, share private event links, and return to past recordings.
myEvents.emptyDescription: Create an event, share its private link, and go live when the celebration begins.
myEvents.dateMissingPremium: Click Edit Event to add time and date

upcoming.title: Upcoming
upcoming.description: Scheduled events ready to share and stream

messages.endedFree: This free livestream has ended. No recording is available.
messages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{eventName}"?
messages.goLiveLogin: Please log in before starting a livestream

viewer.passwordDescription: This livestream is private. Enter the password shared by the host to continue.
viewer.recordingProcessingDescription: The replay is being prepared. This page will update automatically when it is ready.
viewer.recordingFailedDescription: Unfortunately, a replay is not available for this event.
viewer.recordingPrivacy: Please share this private recording only with invited family and friends.
viewer.noRecording: No recording is currently available for this event.
viewer.waitingDescription: The livestream has not started yet. It will begin automatically on this page when the host goes live.
viewer.readyToWatch: The livestream is ready to watch.
viewer.eventFull: This livestream is currently full. Please try again shortly.

streamer.recordingSignInWarning: Recording could not start because you are not signed in.
streamer.recordingResumeWarning: Recording could not resume. Please end and restart if this continues.
streamer.recordingConnectionWarning: Recording could not resume. Please check your connection.
streamer.leaveWarning: Your Premium livestream is still active. Leaving may interrupt recording.
streamer.endLoginRequired: Please log in before ending the livestream

howItWorks.title: A private livestream in four simple steps.
howItWorks.description: SimchaCam is designed for families: create the event, share one private link, and go live from your phone.

steps.title: Create a private event
steps.body: Set up a livestream page in moments, with an optional password.

steps.title: Share the link
steps.body: Send the private event link by WhatsApp, email, or message.

steps.title: Go live from your phone
steps.body: Start the livestream when the celebration begins. No app required.

steps.title: Family watches anywhere
steps.body: Loved ones can join securely from wherever they are.

pricing.title: Start free. Upgrade only if you need more.
pricing.description: Every event starts with a private livestream link. Premium is a one-off upgrade for a specific event.

free.label: Free
free.title: Private livestream
free.description: Perfect for a simple, private family livestream.

premium.label: Premium
premium.description: For longer events, more guests, and a family replay.

why.title: Built for relatives near and far.
why.description: SimchaCam keeps the setup simple for hosts and the viewing simple for guests. Share a private link, protect it with a password if needed, and let family join without installing an app.

recording.title: Keep the moment available after the livestream.
recording.description: Premium events are automatically recorded, then made available for replay and download for 30 days.
recording.cardTitle: Replay for family, download for keeps.
recording.cardBody: Ideal for relatives in different time zones, family who cannot attend live, or anyone who wants to watch the simcha again.

finalCta.title: Create the event free. Upgrade only if you need Premium.
finalCta.description: Start with a private link today, then add scheduling, recording, replay and download when the event needs it.
